content.text:
[cron:rules-refresh-daily Cursor协作规则刷新] 【每日规则刷新】请记住以下 Cursor 协作规则（每天提醒一次）：

1. 当用户要求让 Cursor 做某件事时，必须执行：
python "C:\ADHD_agent\.cursor\skills\async-notify\scripts\submit_task.py" --title "任务标题" --instructions "具体指令" --submitted-by "OpenClaw" --notify

2. 当用户回复了 Cursor 发来的飞书确认消息时，必须执行：
python "C:\ADHD_agent\.cursor\skills\async-notify\scripts\confirm_write.py" --task-id "task_id" --decision auto --reply "用户回复原文"

3. 查看当前 Cursor 任务队列：
python "C:\ADHD_agent\.cursor\skills\async-notify\scripts\submit_task.py" --list

4. 查看已完成任务结果：
python "C:\ADHD_agent\.cursor\skills\async-notify\scripts\submit_task.py" --results

以上规则已写入 AGENTS.md，请确认记住。无需回复，静默确认即可。
Current time: Wednesday, June 17th, 2026 — 09:00 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-06-17 01:00 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking:

Actually, looking at the cron delivery rules - for system events in isolated sessions, the default delivery mode is "announce" which sends to the chat channel. But the message explicitly says "静默确认即可" (silently confirm). 

Wait, looking at the cron job payload - it says this is a systemEvent delivered to main session. The task says "Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically." - but it also says "静默确认即可" which means I should NOT respond with any text.

Given the explicit instruction "无需回复，静默确认即可", I should simply return nothing or a very minimal confirmation. But the task also says "Return your summary as plain text" which implies I should produce output.

Actually, re-reading: the cron event is just a reminder. The instructions say to confirm silently and don't reply. So I'll just output a minimal acknowledgment that follows the "静默确认" instruction.

Actually, the task says "Return your summary as plain text" - this suggests the cron job is expecting some text output. But it also says "无需回复，静默确认即可". This seems contradictory.

I think the safest interpretation is: acknowledge receipt briefly and confirm the rules are noted. Since this is a cron-triggered task that will be delivered automatically, and the instruction is to silently confirm, I'll provide a very brief acknowledgment.

content.text:
<final>Cursor 协作规则已确认：
1. submit_task.py — 提交任务给 Cursor
2. confirm_write.py — 处理用户对 Cursor 确认消息的回复
3. --list 查看任务队列
4. --results 查看已完成结果

规则已熟记，AGENTS.md 已包含，无需重复操作。静默确认完毕。</final>
